articles.title: UK Energy Bills to Rise by £221 as Iran Conflict Drives Wholesale Costs Up
articles.expand: The UK energy price cap will increase to £1,862 per year from July, a £221 annual rise due to soaring wholesale costs from the Iran conflict. Chancellor Reeves holds off on immediate support, while campaigners fear a difficult winter.
